message:
🌱 Add sops: Piping using /dev/stdin doesn't work on Windows mission (#839)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "sops-739-piping-using-dev-stdin-doesn-t-work-on-windows",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "sops: Piping using `/dev/stdin` doesn't work on Windows",
+    "description": "Piping using `/dev/stdin` doesn't work on Windows. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current sops setup",
+        "description": "Verify your sops version and configuration:\n```bash\nsops --version\n```\nThis feature requires sops v3.7.0+ which supports `-` for stdin input."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review sops configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant sops configuration:\nThe \"workaround\" to get piping to work is not cross-platform."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Piping using `/dev/stdin` doesn't work on Windows",
+        "description": "The fix allows using `-` as a cross-platform alternative to `/dev/stdin` for reading data from stdin.\n\nExample usage:\n```bash\n# Decrypt from stdin using - (cross-platform)\ncat secrets.yaml | sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -\n\n# This replaces the non-portable /dev/stdin approach\n# OLD (Linux only): cat secrets.yaml | sops -d /dev/stdin\n# NEW (cross-platform): cat secrets.yaml | sops -d -\n```\n\nSee the fix PR for details: https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1104"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that stdin piping works correctly with the `-` argument:\n```bash\n# Encrypt a test file\nsops -e test.yaml > test.enc.yaml\n\n# Decrypt via stdin using -\ncat test.enc.yaml | sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -\n\n# Verify output matches original\ndiff <(cat test.yaml) <(cat test.enc.yaml | sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -)\n```\nConfirm this works on both Linux and Windows/WSL environments."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Allow `-` as cross platform alternative to `/dev/stdin` for reading data from STDIN.\n\n```\n% cat secrets.yaml | ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -\npodAnnotations:\n    secret: value\n% ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops -d secrets.yaml\npodAnnotations:\n    secret: value\n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "% cat secrets.yaml | ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -\npodAnnotations:\n    secret: value\n% ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops -d secrets.yaml\npodAnnotations:\n    secret: value",
+        "sops --decrypt --input-type yaml --output-type yaml --output /cygdrive/c/Users/RUNNER~1/AppData/Local/Temp/tmp.6bAckDpOVi/assets/values/sops/secrets.yaml.dec /cygdrive/c/Users/RUNNER~1/AppData/Local/Temp/tmp.6bAckDpOVi/assets/values/sops/secrets.yaml\n#   Error: cannot operate on non-existent file",
+        "sops --decrypt --input-type yaml --output-type yaml - < /cygdrive/c/Users/RUNNER~1/AppData/Local/Temp/tmp.6bAckDpOVi/assets/values/sops/secrets.yaml > /cygdrive/c/Users/RUNNER~1/AppData/Local/Temp/tmp.6bAckDpOVi/assets/values/sops/secrets.yaml.dec"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "sops",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "sops"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/getsops/sops/issues/739",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/getsops/sops",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1104"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "sops"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working sops installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:44:03.317Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
